agentStop.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli agent-stop'
agentStop.powershell: if (Get-Command entire -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $input | & entire hooks copilot-cli agent-stop }

errorOccurred.powershell: if (Get-Command entire -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $input | & entire hooks copilot-cli error-occurred }
